title: 1 Kezban 1 Mahmut: Adana Yollarinda
overview: The lives of Emrah and Mahmut, who are students in Istanbul, are about to change. Mahmut has decided to kidnap his girlfriend Kezban because her brother opposes their relationship. Emrah, Mahmut, Kezban, and Emrah's girlfriend Yaprak set off for Emrah's family's summer house in Mersin. At first, everything seems to be going smoothly in Mersin. However, one day, Emrah and Mahmut realize that their girlfriends have been kidnapped. Using the clues they have gathered, they find themselves in Adana. With the help of Serkan, who joins them there, they embark on a comical adventure filled with humorous incidents.
